title: The Idea & Community
text:
Revoria started as a small oldschool Tibia project focused on rebuilding the feeling of classic PvP gameplay.
The first goal was simple: create a community, share the vision and prepare a combat environment shaped together with players.

title: Combat Test Environment
text:
The first public war server will be online soon for testing.
Players can instantly enter the battlefield, fight continuously and help us test movement, healing, rune balance, death systems and overall PvP pacing.

title: Feedback & Iteration
text:
The next phase focuses on collecting player feedback, fixing bugs and improving gameplay mechanics based on real combat situations.
Future updates may include progression systems, frag rewards and additional PvP objectives.
